password_too_short: Password must be at least 6 characters

selection.title: Select User Type
selection.change_later: You can change it later in settings

consent.title: Terms and Conditions
consent.agree: I agree to the terms and conditions
consent.gym_intro: I agree to use the gym facilities responsibly and in accordance with the following terms:
consent.gym_rule_1: I will use equipment safely and follow all posted safety guidelines
consent.gym_rule_2: I will clean equipment after use and return weights to their proper storage
consent.gym_rule_3: I will respect other users and maintain appropriate conduct
consent.gym_rule_4: I will report any equipment issues or safety concerns immediately
consent.gym_rule_5: I understand that I use the gym at my own risk
consent.gym_rule_6: I will not hold the facility responsible for any injuries that may occur
consent.gym_disclaimer: By signing below, I acknowledge that I have read, understood, and agree to these terms.
consent.agree_checkbox: I have read and agree to the gym usage terms

pending_approval.title: Registration Pending Approval
pending_approval.message: Your registration has been submitted and is pending approval from an administrator.
pending_approval.check_back_later: Please check back later or contact support if you have any questions.
pending_approval.submitted_message: Your request to work here has been submitted successfully. Please wait for your boss to approve your access.
pending_approval.next_step_1: Your request will be reviewed by management
pending_approval.next_step_2: You can then log in and access the app
pending_approval.error_no_doc: User document not found. Please complete your profile setup first.
pending_approval.error_invalid_status: Invalid user status. Please complete your profile setup first.
pending_approval.error_check_status: Failed to check user status. Please try again.
pending_approval.error_monitor: Failed to monitor user status. Please try again.
